entries.description: Unlocks access to Tier 2 supplier catalogs, offering rarer and more valuable stock.
entries.unlock_message: Tier 2 suppliers now available! Check the order panel for new stock options.

entries.description: Extends the business day by one additional phase, giving more time for customer traffic.
entries.unlock_message: Business hours extended! Your store stays open one phase longer each day.

entries.description: Shows upcoming market events one day in advance on the HUD, letting you prepare stock and pricing.
entries.unlock_message: Market forecasts unlocked! Check the HUD for tomorrow's market events.

entries.description: Enables rare VIP customer spawns who carry larger budgets and seek premium merchandise.
entries.unlock_message: VIP customers may now visit your store! Watch for high-budget shoppers.

entries.description: A distinguished nameplate displayed on your storefront, signaling your success to all who pass by.
entries.unlock_message: Prestige nameplate unlocked! Your storefront now bears a mark of distinction.

entries.description: A dedicated wall fixture for showcasing rare imports and signature retro games. Adds three high-visibility display slots.
entries.unlock_message: Import Wall Display unlocked! Place it in Retro Games to feature your rarest imports.

entries.description: A bronze badge displayed on your save slot and end screen, commemorating your retail achievements.
entries.unlock_message: Bronze badge earned! This badge appears on your save slot and end screen.

entries.description: Vic walked you through the register on Day 1. You can ring sales without a supervisor at your shoulder.
entries.unlock_message: Register access granted. Run the counter.

entries.description: Backroom-to-shelf flow signed off. You decide what goes where, within reason.
entries.unlock_message: Stocking certification granted. Mind the planogram.

entries.description: You can quote and accept trade-ins without Vic countersigning every slip.
The hold-list terminal is yours to manage — flag items, log regulars, retire stale holds.
Featured-display layout is your call now. Don't bury the high-margin stuff.
End-of-day reconciliation, alarm code, lockup. The closing checklist is yours.
